description: Stock symbols and company names for securities listed on the NYSE and other U.S. exchanges (NYSE American, NYSE Arca, CBOE/BATS), sourced daily from the NASDAQ Trader FTP symbol directory.

licenses.name: ODC-PDDL-1.0
licenses.title: Open Data Commons Public Domain Dedication and License

name: nyse-other-listings

resources.description: Securities listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), filtered from the NASDAQ other-listed file where Exchange = N. Contains ACT symbol and company name only.
resources.name: nyse-listed

fields.description: Ticker symbol used in the Automated Confirmation of Transactions (ACT) system.
fields.name: ACT Symbol

fields.description: Company name parsed from Security Name by taking the text before the first hyphen.
fields.name: Company Name

resources.description: All securities listed on exchanges other than NASDAQ: NYSE (N), NYSE American (A), NYSE Arca (P), and CBOE/BATS (Z). Test issues are excluded. Company Name is derived from Security Name by taking the text before the first hyphen.
resources.name: other-listed

fields.description: Ticker symbol used in the Automated Confirmation of Transactions (ACT) system.
fields.name: ACT Symbol

fields.description: Company name parsed from Security Name by taking the text before the first hyphen.
fields.name: Company Name

fields.description: Full security name as published in the NASDAQ symbol directory.
fields.name: Security Name

fields.description: Exchange where the security is listed: N=NYSE, A=NYSE American, P=NYSE Arca, Z=CBOE/BATS.
fields.name: Exchange

fields.description: Consolidated Quotation System (CQS) symbol used for trade reporting.
fields.name: CQS Symbol

fields.description: Indicates whether the security is an Exchange-Traded Fund (Y=yes, N=no).
fields.name: ETF

fields.description: Standard trading unit (round lot) size in number of shares.
fields.name: Round Lot Size

fields.description: Indicates whether the listing is a test issue (Y=yes, N=no). Always N in this file as test issues are excluded.
fields.name: Test Issue

fields.description: NASDAQ trading symbol for the security.
fields.name: NASDAQ Symbol

title: NYSE and Other Listings
